// QTP_VC_FEEDBACK_PROMPT_20260506: strict feedback prompt is appended upstream where _vc_prompt is built.
return $input.all();

// Sheet Row Builder v4 — Row data serialized to JSON body string
const inp = $input.first().json;
const safe = v => (v === null || v === undefined) ? '' : String(v).substring(0, 500);

const row = [
  safe(inp['Timestamp']),
  safe(inp['Date']),
  safe(inp['Ticker']),
  safe(inp['Strategy']),
  safe(inp['TF']),
  safe(inp['Execution']),
  safe(inp['Signal']),
  safe(inp['Price']),
  safe(inp['Bull']),
  safe(inp['Bear']),
  safe(inp['RSI'] || inp['rsi'] || ''),
  safe(inp['ADX'] || inp['adx'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VIX'] || inp['vix'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Regime'] || inp['regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Daily Trend'] || inp['daily_trend'] || ''),
  safe(inp['SPY'] || inp['spy_status'] || ''),
  safe(inp['QQQ'] || inp['qqq_status'] || ''),
  safe(inp["Net%"] || inp['strat_net_pct'] || ''),
  safe(inp["WR%"] || inp['strat_win_rate'] || ''),
  safe(inp['PF']  || inp['strat_profit_factor'] || ''),
  safe(inp['MaxDD'] || inp['strat_max_dd'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Trades'] || inp['strat_total_trades'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Options'] || inp['opt_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Dark Pool'] || inp['dp_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Cross-Asset'] || inp['ca_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['CA Score'] || inp['ca_composite_score'] || ''),
  safe(inp['SM Conf'] || inp['_sm_max_confidence'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Score'] || inp['_vc_score'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Verdict'] || inp['_vc_verdict'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Pass'] || inp['_vc_pass'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Feedback'] || inp['_vc_feedback'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Red Flags'] || ''),
  safe(inp['DD Halt'] || inp['dd_halt'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VIX Size'] || inp['vix_size_mult'] || ''),
  safe(inp["Pos Size%"] || inp['eff_position_size'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Outcome'] || inp['outcome'] || ''),
  safe(inp["P&L"] || inp['pnl'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Notes'] || ''),
];

const body = JSON.stringify({
  range: "Sheet1",
  majorDimension: "ROWS",
  values: [row]
});

return [{ json: { ...inp, _sheet_body: body } }];

parameters.jsCode:
// QTP Supabase Main Trading Alpaca risk gate query v4.2.1
const d = $json || {};
return [{
  json: {
    ...d,
    __supabase_apt_risk_sql: `
      WITH latest AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM quantum.position_risk_state
        WHERE observed_at = (SELECT MAX(observed_at) FROM quantum.position_risk_state)
      ),
      summary AS (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*) AS open_positions,
          SUM(CASE WHEN protection_status = 'FULLY_PROTECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fully_protected_positions,
          SUM(CASE WHEN protection_status <> 'FULLY_PROTECTED' OR blocks_phase_2 = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS phase_2_blockers,
          SUM(CASE WHEN blocks_new_entries = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_entry_blockers,
          SUM(CASE WHEN blocks_new_shorts = true OR blocks_new_entries = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS short_entry_blockers,
          MAX(observed_at) AS checked_at
        FROM latest
      )
      SELECT
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(phase_2_blockers,0) = 0 THEN 'GO' ELSE 'BLOCK_PHASE_2' END AS phase_2_status,
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(new_entry_blockers,0) = 0 THEN 'ALLOW_WITH_NORMAL_GATES' ELSE 'BLOCK_NEW_ENTRIES' END AS new_entry_status,
        COALESCE(phase_2_blockers,0)::text AS phase_2_blockers,
        COALESCE(new_entry_blockers,0)::text AS new_entry_blockers,
        COALESCE(short_entry_blockers,0)::text AS short_entry_blockers,
        checked_at::text AS checked_at,
        open_positions::text AS open_positions,
        fully_protected_positions::text AS fully_protected_positions
      FROM summary
    `,
    migration_version: 'QTP_SUPABASE_MAIN_TRADING_v4.2.1'
  }
}];

// Sheet Row Builder v4 — Row data serialized to JSON body string
const inp = $input.first().json;
const safe = v => (v === null || v === undefined) ? '' : String(v).substring(0, 500);

const row = [
  safe(inp['Timestamp']),
  safe(inp['Date']),
  safe(inp['Ticker']),
  safe(inp['Strategy']),
  safe(inp['TF']),
  safe(inp['Execution']),
  safe(inp['Signal']),
  safe(inp['Price']),
  safe(inp['Bull']),
  safe(inp['Bear']),
  safe(inp['RSI'] || inp['rsi'] || ''),
  safe(inp['ADX'] || inp['adx'] || ''),

  safe(inp['Regime'] || inp['regime'] || ''),

  safe(inp['PF']  || inp['strat_profit_factor'] || ''),
  safe(inp['MaxDD'] || inp['strat_max_dd'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Trades'] || inp['strat_total_trades'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Options'] || inp['opt_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Dark Pool'] || inp['dp_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Cross-Asset'] || inp['ca_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['CA Score'] || inp['ca_composite_score'] || ''),
  safe(inp['SM Conf'] || inp['_sm_max_confidence'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Score'] || inp['_vc_score'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Verdict'] || inp['_vc_verdict'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Pass'] || inp['_vc_pass'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Feedback'] || inp['_vc_feedback'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Red Flags'] || ''),
  safe(inp['DD Halt'] || inp['dd_halt'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VIX Size'] || inp['vix_size_mult'] || ''),
  safe(inp["Pos Size%"] || inp['eff_position_size'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Outcome'] || inp['outcome'] || ''),
  safe(inp["P&L"] || inp['pnl'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Notes'] || ''),
];

const body = JSON.stringify({
  range: "Sheet1",
  majorDimension: "ROWS",
  values: [row]
});

return [{ json: { ...inp, _sheet_body: body } }];

// QTP Supabase Main Trading Alpaca risk gate query v4.2.1
const d = $json || {};
return [{
  json: {
    ...d,
    __supabase_apt_risk_sql: `
      WITH latest AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM quantum.position_risk_state
        WHERE observed_at = (SELECT MAX(observed_at) FROM quantum.position_risk_state)
      ),
      summary AS (
        SELECT
          COUNT(*) AS open_positions,
          SUM(CASE WHEN protection_status = 'FULLY_PROTECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fully_protected_positions,
          SUM(CASE WHEN protection_status <> 'FULLY_PROTECTED' OR blocks_phase_2 = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS phase_2_blockers,
          SUM(CASE WHEN blocks_new_entries = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_entry_blockers,
          SUM(CASE WHEN blocks_new_shorts = true OR blocks_new_entries = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS short_entry_blockers,
          MAX(observed_at) AS checked_at
        FROM latest
      )
      SELECT
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(phase_2_blockers,0) = 0 THEN 'GO' ELSE 'BLOCK_PHASE_2' END AS phase_2_status,
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(new_entry_blockers,0) = 0 THEN 'ALLOW_WITH_NORMAL_GATES' ELSE 'BLOCK_NEW_ENTRIES' END AS new_entry_status,
        COALESCE(phase_2_blockers,0)::text AS phase_2_blockers,
        COALESCE(new_entry_blockers,0)::text AS new_entry_blockers,
        COALESCE(short_entry_blockers,0)::text AS short_entry_blockers,
        checked_at::text AS checked_at,
        open_positions::text AS open_positions,
        fully_protected_positions::text AS fully_protected_positions
      FROM summary
    `,
    migration_version: 'QTP_SUPABASE_MAIN_TRADING_v4.2.1'
  }
}];
